scripts.dev: concurrently -n desktop,gateway -c cyan,green "pnpm -C apps/desktop dev" "pnpm -C services/gateway dev"
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -n gateway,electron -c green,cyan "pnpm -C services/gateway dev" "pnpm -C apps/desktop electron:dev"
scripts.build: pnpm -C services/gateway build && pnpm -C apps/desktop build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm -C services/gateway typecheck && pnpm -C apps/desktop typecheck
scripts.dist:mac: pnpm -C apps/desktop build && pnpm -C apps/desktop pack:mac
scripts.dist:win: pnpm -C apps/desktop build && pnpm -C apps/desktop pack:win
